data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies user decision-making by limiting options on a given page.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design approach with focused CTAs.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs interactive elements big enough to be easily selectable.
data.technical_spec: Large, touch-friendly buttons and intuitive spacing.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements together to improve content organization.
data.technical_spec: Consistent spacing and alignment to create logical groups.

data.title: Law of Uniform Connectedness
data.description: Creates visual connections using uniform colors and lines.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color schemes and iconography throughout the site.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Ensures that aesthetically pleasing designs are perceived as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: High-fidelity graphics and smooth animations to guide user interaction.
